description: With a sleek and sporty look, this Lil'd-Sunkiss sneaker from skechers comes with a generously padded, moisture-wicking mesh lining that keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. The low profile midsole and flexible traction outsole makes this a great reason to buy. Upper Mesh upper wuth strategically placed synthetic overlays for lightweight comfort Lace-ups for a snug, customised Fit Padded and meshed tongue and collar for snug comfort Padded footbed for all-day comfort Midsole Lightweight and sturdy sculpted EVA midsole for all-day comfort, superior flexibility and cushioning Outsole Durable rubber outsole with treads for improved traction shoe care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
